message: Utter defeat.
Once I understood that, the conclusion was simple.
My existence was no longer necessary.
The personality created to erase Mamiya Takuji was instead defeated by him.
More than anyone else on this planet, I was worthless and unnecessary.
"So now what? Are you just gonna disappear?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Who's that?"
"You don't recognize me?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Why the long face, pardner?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Long face? Does that mean you can see me?"

name: Yuki
message: "Of course I can."

name: Tomosane
message: "I thought I would never see you again."

name: Yuki
message: "Never again, huh? You said that before, too."

name: Tomosane
message: "Before? Did I say that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, quite a while back. Don't worry about it."
The warmth of her skin...
The scent of her body...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right. I have a certain feeling to me, don't I?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "Then try lifting your consciousness to the surface."

name: Tomosane
message: "Lifting my consciousness?"

name: Yuki
message: "Right now, Mamiya is sound asleep. It shouldn't be all that hard."

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya is sound asleep..."
I was buffeted by the wind.
I'd never felt such a cool wind at this time of year.

name: Tomosane
message: "Where are we?"
The trees rustled in the wind. A creek babbled in the distance.

name: Tomosane
message: "It's a bit chilly. Is it autumn already?"

name: Yuki
message: "What do you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I just thought maybe I was out for a long time. Like a few months or so."

name: Yuki
message: "If you were gone for that long, you would never come back."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then why is it so chilly?"

name: Tomosane
message: "And besides... is that water I hear? It sounds like there's a stream nearby."

name: Yuki
message: "Open your eyes."

name: Tomosane
message: "My eyes?"
Oh, my eyes weren't open. That's why it was so dark.

name: Yuki
message: "Can you see?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My eyes won't open."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really? Well, don't worry about it. Can you hear the sounds? Can you feel the wind?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, I can, but..."
I had forgotten how to open my eyes. I couldn't pry them open.

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahahaha... Apparently, some people forget how to breathe, you know? Like when they're sleeping and stuff. But don't worry, you just need to calm yourself."

name: Yuki
message: "Calm yourself... and open your eyes. You can still see, I promise."

name: Tomosane
message: "Calm..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What's... going on?"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm carrying you."

name: Tomosane
message: "I can see that, but why are you carrying me?"

name: Yuki
message: "You got the crap beaten out of you, remember?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But that doesn't mean my body was actually injured. If it was, Mamiya Takuji would've been injured too."

name: Yuki
message: "So?"

name: Tomosane
message: "So I'm fine. Now let me down."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? I thought you couldn't move at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"
When I tried to get down, I could hardly move my body at all.

name: Tomosane
message: "What's going on?"

name: Yuki
message: "I told you, he beat the crap out of you."

name: Tomosane
message: "But that was just in my head..."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? Those wounds aren't the only thing in your head. You and I only exist in your head too, you know?"

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not what I mean."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no such thing as a fake wound. Pain is still pain. There's no faking that."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, I guess it does happen sometimes. Like if you go to the doctor, maybe he tells you there's no way that part of your body actually hurts, but then I'd probably just call the doctor stupid."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no such thing as illusory pain. If it hurts, it's pain. Those wounds you received weren't fake, either."

name: Tomosane
message: "Don't get philosophical on me now."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, if I'm being perfectly serious, I just forcibly pulled you up from your unconscious state. That's why you can't move right now."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean? You can forcibly bring my consciousness to the forefront?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, there are a few risks involved."

name: Tomosane
message: "Risks?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, don't worry about it. We're here."

name: Tomosane
message: "Here?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Where are we?"

name: Yuki
message: "The dojo, specifically the back door. We used to train here, remember?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I don't. Besides, where is this, really?"

name: Yuki
message: "The Mamiya dojo. Isn't it nostalgic?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Mamiya's dojo? You mean our father's martial arts dojo out in the countryside?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's the one."

name: Tomosane
message: "Sure it's nostalgic or whatever, but more importantly... Why are we here? I mean, shouldn't it take like..."

name: Yuki
message: "Hours and hours to get here from Tokyo?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it's not the kind of place you can just come to on a whim. Why are we here all of a sudden?"

name: Yuki
message: "I know what you mean. Why do you think?"

name: Tomosane
message: "We traveled here while I was unconscious? How long was I out this time?"

name: Yuki
message: "How long do you think?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm not really sure, but it doesn't feel like it was that long."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, really... How long do you think, then?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A night... or maybe a little longer. I'd say about a whole day. That's about how long it feels like."

name: Yuki
message: "And yet you're shocked to find that you've been transported to a far away place."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that about sums it up... So what's going on?"

name: Yuki
message: "I don't know, what do you think is going on?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, right, how's your body feel? Can you move yet?"

name: Tomosane
message: "My body? Oh, you're right."
Before, I could hardly move my body at all, but now I could move it normally.
It was like I had forgotten how to move my limbs... or maybe, like my entire body was weighted down with lead. That kind of feeling.
That feeling was like...

name: Yuki
message: "Like what? What's it like?"
That's right. This particular feeling of unreality...

name: Tomosane
message: "In just a day or two... I don't know exactly how much time has passed, but it doesn't seem like I could actually be standing here, so maybe..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A dream... Is this a dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... Bingo. You're smarter than you look."

name: Tomosane
message: "This weird feeling in my body is just like a dream, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh? Is something wrong?"
What's different?
I can't quite put my finger on it...

name: Tomosane
message: "It's like my consciousness is too clear for this to be a dream... It's like I'm really awake. And besides, I've never been aware that I was dreaming while the dream was still going on before."

name: Yuki
message: "I know what you mean. Dreams should be a bit silly, right? Your thoughts and everything you see would be a bit off-kilter. Well, would you believe it was a dream if I was naked right now?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You're welcome to try it."

name: Yuki
message: "As if!"

name: Tomosane
message: "What's your deal? You're the one who was flashing me your panties a few days ago."

name: Yuki
message: "There's a big difference between panties and actual nudity. Panties are just cloth, you know."

name: Tomosane
message: "Who cares about that?! Anyway, are we in, uh..."

name: Tomosane
message: "A lucid dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, good job. I knew you would figure it out."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, I really don't know much about them. I've just heard other people talk about them."

name: Yuki
message: "Do you want me to explain?"

name: Tomosane
message: "For future reference, I suppose..."

name: Yuki
message: "Sure. It's important that you know what's really going on. At least if you feel up to it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Up to what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, don't worry about it. Anyway, lucid dreams are, uh... Well, to put it simply, it's a dream that you can control, one that you're completely aware of."

name: Yuki
message: "The frontal lobe and hippocampus in your brain... Uh, just think of them as the parts that control thought, consciousness, and long-term memory."

name: Yuki
message: "When you're awake, those parts process the information you see and hear. And when you're dreaming, you can partially wake up your frontal lobe and then it can control your dreams in cooperation with your hippocampus."

name: Tomosane
message: "Partially wake up my frontal lobe? I think I understand the idea, but is that really possible?"

name: Yuki
message: "I guess it's possible if you practice enough."

name: Tomosane
message: "Practice? Does that mean this is a world created through practice?"

name: Yuki
message: "I guess so."

name: Tomosane
message: "Coincidental fruits of our labor, I guess?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, there's a trick to it. Most people get really confused when their frontal lobe wakes up during a dream."

name: Tomosane
message: "Confusion, huh? I think I understand. When you say partially wake up, it makes me think of sleep paralysis."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, when people become aware of their dreams, they usually feel like they're trapped and can't move their bodies."

name: Yuki
message: "The difference between their real body and their dream body... That incongruence makes your hippocampus remember that you're sleeping."

name: Tomosane
message: "So even though you're not awake, your brain creates a situation where you believe you're awake?"

name: Yuki
message: "Then your heart rate rises, your breathing speeds up, and finally you wake up."

name: Tomosane
message: "So that feeling from before where I couldn't move my body was because I was in a state of half-consciousness?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, because even in the dream you were still trying to move your real body."

name: Tomosane
message: "But I didn't wake up. Was that because of your power?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I can't freely control my dreams. I can't imagine it wasn't your power. Didn't you say you practiced it?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, there are a lot of techniques for becoming aware of your dreams. The people on the Malay Peninsula have been developing their own technique for lucid dreaming for millennia."

name: Tomosane
message: "The technique for surviving erasure at Mamiya Takuji's hands... Even while your consciousness is locked away, you need to ensure a minimal level of conscious activity."

name: Tomosane
message: "Which means this power... Lucid dreaming would be the most useful skill for you to acquire."

name: Yuki
message: "You could say that."

name: Tomosane
message: "That must mean this is your dream."

name: Yuki
message: "Really?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Well... is it not?"

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't it a bit hasty to say it's definitely my dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Why? What's hasty about that? Didn't you practice to acquire this skill?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, but still, wouldn't that be a bit weird?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What would?"

name: Yuki
message: "For instance, if Hasaki-chan was here, would that be the real Hasaki-chan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? Of course not. Besides, Hasaki couldn't come here."

name: Yuki
message: "But it wouldn't be that weird if Hasaki-chan appeared in one of your dreams, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "But that would just be part of the dream. The real Hasaki could never appear in my dream."

name: Yuki
message: "Then if this is my dream, that would make you just a part of my dream. Are you an illusion that my brain is creating?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, wait, I'm not an illusion."

name: Yuki
message: "Then maybe it's the reverse, and I'm the one that's an illusion."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, wait... I'm not capable of controlling my dreams like this."

name: Tomosane
message: "Besides, what you're saying doesn't apply to us, since we share the same body."

name: Yuki
message: "Really? Is it that simple?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Why?"

name: Yuki
message: "For example, let's say this isn't dissociative identity disorder, or what most people call multiple personality disorder. Suppose we didn't have that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh? What do you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Just listen for a second. For instance, what if there was only one body between us."

name: Yuki
message: "But in that one body, let's suppose that three souls had actually taken up residence. Each one of those souls could dream."

name: Yuki
message: "And when one soul dreams, most of the people in that dream would be people who don't share the same body. Let's say those people were just fabrications of a dreaming mind."

name: Yuki
message: "And let's assume that the only people in the dream who weren't just fabrications were two of the souls sharing the same body."

name: Yuki
message: "Isn't that a bit weird?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Uh... That was sort of complicated, so I'm not really sure. First of all, there's no such thing as a soul. We're just the symptoms of an illness."

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I see. So there's no such thing as a soul, huh? Okay, let's start from that assumption, then."

name: Yuki
message: "But you know, there's still the possibility that this dream isn't mine or yours, and neither of us truly exists."

name: Tomosane
message: "What are you trying to say?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's just, if you say that this world is someone's dream, then reality could be someone's dream too."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not true. You can wake up from a dream. If you don't wake up, then it's reality."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So an endless dream is reality, and you assume that you'll eventually wake up from this dream. Okay, if you say so."

name: Tomosane
message: "So then... why are we here?"

name: Yuki
message: "Why not? You don't like the Mamiya dojo?"

name: Tomosane
message: "It doesn't matter to me, but it's not like you or I have ever actually seen the dojo, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "You think so? I suppose we didn't develop multiple personalities until quite a while after Mamiya Takuji was in Sawaimura."

name: Tomosane
message: "So why did you pick a place only Mamiya Takuji knows?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hmm... I guess you don't even recognize this place in your dreams, huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course not. I didn't exist until just two years ago, and it's been more than ten years since Mamiya Takuji stayed here."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah... I guess you could say that, but it would make sense if you had the same memories, right? You share quite a lot of memories with him, don't you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shared memories..."

name: Yuki
message: "Memories about places are almost always shared, right? The layout of the school building, the road home... All those have to be shared or we'd get lost all the time, right?"
Now that she mentions it...
Place-based memories are almost always shared.
And besides that, language, common sense, and other knowledge necessary for day-to-day life. Basic, normal knowledge a person should have is shared between us.
Which means I should have memories about this place too.

name: Yuki
message: "But you don't remember this place at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, not even a little."

name: Yuki
message: "I see... So you don't remember it... That makes sense, I guess."

name: Tomosane
message: "What makes sense?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows? All right, more importantly, I have a question for you."

name: Tomosane
message: "A question?"

name: Yuki
message: "I guess it's just something I want to confirm. Something I need to confirm."

name: Tomosane
message: "Confirm what?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, um... No matter whether this is your dream or mine, this situation wouldn't come about unless someone wanted it to."

name: Tomosane
message: "Someone wanted this to happen?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, which in this case means you or me. One of us wanted to have a lucid dream. Normal dreams aren't like that, but you can't have a lucid dream by accident."

name: Tomosane
message: "Well, if you say so..."

name: Yuki
message: "Answer this next question honestly."

name: Tomosane
message: "What question?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's really important, all right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah... Sure."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahem... First off.
It's very hard to have a lucid dream, but it's very easy to wake up."

name: Yuki
message: "But you can either keep dreaming, or you can wake up. Which means you can go back to reality."

name: Tomosane
message: "Reality?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. If you wake up now, the Tomosane personality will return to the real world."

name: Yuki
message: "If you do that, you can go talk to the real Hasaki-chan, or even Master at Hakushuukyou."

name: Tomosane
message: "It sounds like you just said something really important."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right, I did. It's important that you understand that."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then let me ask... What if I don't wake up from this dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "The next time you wake up will probably... no, it will definitely be your last battle with Mamiya Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "My last battle with Mamiya?"

name: Yuki
message: "To put it simply, the deciding battle between Mamiya Takuji and you, Yuuki Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "And no matter who wins, that will be the last time 'Yuuki Tomosane' wakes up."

name: Tomosane
message: "The last time that I... that 'Yuuki Tomosane' wakes up?"

name: Yuki
message: "If you wake up now... If you can wake up, then there's still time for you to do what you need to in the real world."

name: Yuki
message: "You were right earlier. Today is the 15th, and you've been out for about a day."

name: Yuki
message: "If you wake up now, there's still a bit of time left."

name: Tomosane
message: "And if I don't?"

name: Yuki
message: "You won't have another chance."

name: Tomosane
message: "The final battle, huh..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep. I don't know why, but it seems like he has a clear goal in mind now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it looks that way. When we fought, he said something really weird."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's why you've become an entirely unnecessary person in Mamiya Takuji's eyes. And as time passes, his self-certainty will only grow stronger."

name: Yuki
message: "This lucid dream right now is your last chance. If this dream ends, you probably won't be able to wake up before the last battle."

name: Tomosane
message: "How do you know I'll wake up at the final battle next?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, part of it is just my intuition, but he didn't finish you off last time, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Yuki
message: "If he didn't finish you off, that means you two will have to fight again... That's all."

name: Yuki
message: "So I guess I can't be certain that there will be a battle."

name: Yuki
message: "But whether you choose to wake up or stay in this lucid dream, this could very well be the last of the time you have left."

name: Tomosane
message: "So this is the end..."

name: Yuki
message: "You should know it too, right? July 20th, 2012."

name: Tomosane
message: "The prophecy..."

name: Yuki
message: "Several decades ago, before Mamiya Takuji was even born, a religious leader prophesied that the world would end on this day."

name: Tomosane
message: "The White Lotus Association..."

name: Yuki
message: "You know about it?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, not at all. That word just entered my brain when I made contact with Mamiya Takuji. It was a memory that he had."

name: Yuki
message: "Anyway, Mamiya Takuji believes that the world will be destroyed on July 20th, 2012."

name: Yuki
message: "And on the border of that day... on the 19th, he thinks he has to return it all to the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "What does returning something to the sky mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "You know what it means, Tomosane."
What was that just now?

name: Yuki
message: "Returning something to the sky means exactly that. Returning it to the sky. Well, if those people could fly like birds, maybe they'd make it to the sky."

name: Tomosane
message: "They fall...

name: Yuki
message: "And die."

name: Tomosane
message: "You said returning 'everything,' but what does that really mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "According to the prophecy, it's a great number of people, but 'a great number' of people is entirely subjective. Either way, I'm sure that he wants to return as many people to the sky as he can."

name: Tomosane
message: "Hasaki isn't supposed to be one of those people, is she?"

name: Yuki
message: "Who knows?"

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean? Mamiya Takuji created you to protect Hasaki."

name: Yuki
message: "But hasn't he already broken those laws?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"

name: Yuki
message: "Those same laws say that you have to defeat Mamiya Takuji and strike him the final blow."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then what about Hasaki? Hasaki is the closest person to him, so if he wants to return all of humanity to the sky, then would he start with..."

name: Yuki
message: "Are you worried about Hasaki-chan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I am! Aren't you?!"

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not the one who has to decide. I'm asking about your intention. Do you want to protect Hasaki-chan?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Of course I do. If something happened to Hasaki..."

name: Yuki
message: "Good. So go protect Hasaki-chan."

name: Tomosane
message: "You want me... to protect her?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. To be honest, I don't think it's impossible that Mamiya Takuji might try to kill her."

name: Yuki
message: "Or it might be more logical to assume that he will."

name: Tomosane
message: "What?! Why didn't you say that earlier?!"

name: Yuki
message: "But think it through. He doesn't think that returning to the sky means killing someone, he thinks it's the way to a better world."

name: Yuki
message: "Cults spring up all the time, right? There was a famous cult in the 90s that thought it wasn't bad to kill people because killing people was just 'Phowa.'"

name: Tomosane
message: "So what's going to happen to Hasaki?"

name: Yuki
message: "Well, it's already ended, so maybe he's satisfied as is, but..."

name: Tomosane
message: "What do you mean? What's ended?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, don't mind me. I'm just talking to myself. Regardless, protecting Hasaki is your job now, Tomosane."

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, are you..."

name: Yuki
message: "I'm not coddling you anymore! You can't rely on me forever."

name: Tomosane
message: "Coddling?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. If you want to protect Haskai-chan, then you'll have to be the one to protect her."

name: Yuki
message: "I mean, don't you get it? Those rules about the Destroyer and the Harmonizer, all that just got flushed down the toilet."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"

name: Yuki
message: "If you want to protect her, the best thing you can do is go back to the real world."

name: Tomosane
message: "You want me to go back?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, for instance, you could get Hasaki-chan to a safe place, where Mamiya Takuji can't reach her."

name: Yuki
message: "Well, you don't have to go too far. Wouldn't she be safe if you asked Master at Hakushuukyou to protect her?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Master... could protect her."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, if that's what you want to do, then you should go back right now. You'll get to see Hasaki-chan again, too. If you're intent on protecting her, then that's the best way."

name: Tomosane
message: "But that's only one choice... is what you're saying."

name: Yuki
message: "Yep."

name: Tomosane
message: "Earlier you said that we're here because at least one of us wanted to be here, right? Here in the world of a lucid dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."
This world appeared because either Yuki or I wished for it.
I was struck by the impulse to just ask Yuki... "Were you the one who wished for it?"
But I couldn't.
That would just be relying on Yuki again.
That's right... The one who wanted this world to exist...

name: Tomosane
message: "I am here... because I wanted it."

name: Yuki
message: "That's a good answer."
Then why did I want this dream?
A lucid dream, a kind of world I could control...
What I wanted...
To return from this place, to the real world. To spend the rest of the time I have left with Hasaki.
To protect Hasaki. To accept the same fate as Mamiya Takuji.
To return to the sky... In other words, to die.
The other choice...

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki, you said we could manipulate this dream. What did you mean?"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe. Didn't I just tell you about the lucid dream's structure, and how to have one?"

name: Tomosane
message: "No, that's not what I mean. I'm not asking how to induce one, but how to control it."

name: Tomosane
message: "Something like this... Have you heard the story about when the swordsman, Itou Ittousai, learned his famous technique, the Annihilating Blade?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Ittousai unwittingly spent the night with a woman who bore him a grudge."

name: Tomosane
message: "Once he feel asleep, she hid a blade under his pillow, and then beckoned dozens of assassins to come into his room."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ittousai was a hair's width away from death, but even in his sleep, he evaded his opponent's blades, and before he even awoke he had mastered the new technique."

name: Yuki
message: "But that story is bullshit."

name: Tomosane
message: "But Ittousai already possessed a secret technique called the Dream Blade. It was said to allow him to unconsciously cut his enemies down."

name: Yuki
message: "A lucid dream. Waking only one part of the brain during unconsciousness, and controlling your dream. When we invoke the mental state of the great swordsman of the past, we enter a lucid dream. Is that what you mean?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah. It's just my intuition, though."

name: Yuki
message: "Ahahaha, that's a good answer, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "I see. So you want to find a mental state that eludes you outside your dreams... You think there might be an answer here in the lucid dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, didn't you say that Mamiya Takuji could sense my movements even when he wasn't conscious?"

name: Yuki
message: "Even when he's out like a light, he still knows what's going on in the world, just as if he was awake."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see..."

name: Yuki
message: "Heh, hehehe..."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wh-What's so funny?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, come on. Use your common sense. There's no way my lucid dream could ever be the same as a famous swordsman's. Itou Ittousai was said to have never lost a duel in his life, and that was during the violence of the Sengoku Period."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's true, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "Besides, the best I can do with my powers is watch the other two people in the same body."

name: Tomosane
message: "But still, that's hard... I don't understand it at all."

name: Tomosane
message: "And the person I'm fighting is not a master, an expert, or a virtuoso."

name: Tomosane
message: "The one I'm fighting is Mamiya Takuji. As you put it, one of those other people in the same body."

name: Tomosane
message: "If this mindstate will help me beat him, there's value in acquiring it even if it's useless against anyone else."

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... Just so you know, in all dreams, including lucid dreams, your perception of time gets messed up. What feels like an hour to you in a dream might be a few minutes in reality."

name: Yuki
message: "It's not the same as the master swordsman's technique, but you can clearly affect the amount of time the other personalities are conscious."

name: Tomosane
message: "Which means?"

name: Yuki
message: "If you can acquire the right mindstate, you might be able to defeat Mamiya Takuji."

name: Tomosane
message: "Could I win?"

name: Yuki
message: "Only if you really understand it, but it's not a simple thing to learn."

name: Tomosane
message: "I know that it's not simple."

name: Yuki
message: "I see... You haven't changed a bit, have you?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I haven't changed?"

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, I'm just talking to myself. All right, this is Yuki-nee's final lesson."

name: Yuki
message: "So that you can overcome everything... So that, at the end of it all, you will win."

name: Yuki
message: "We'll have a match."

name: Yuki
message: "What even I could do for the sake of those final moments."
Did Yuki just say something?

name: Tomosane
message: "Huh?!"

name: Yuki
message: "What's wrong? Why so surprised?"
Wh-What was that? I didn't see her hit me at all.

name: Yuki
message: "What, was it that surprising?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm more than just surprised. That attack just now..."

name: Yuki
message: "What, you couldn't see it coming?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah, it didn't feel normal at all."

name: Yuki
message: "What are you talking about? Of course it didn't. This is a dream."

name: Yuki
message: "In order for two people in the same body to read each other's moves, they would have to react after the electrical impulses were sent to the muscles in the body, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Yeah..."

name: Yuki
message: "But there's no real need for us to send those signals to the real body, so there would be no time lag to react to."

name: Tomosane
message: "In other words, I can't avoid your attacks because there's no delay before you hit me."

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... You think? Try attacking me."

name: Yuki
message: "Weird, huh? I shouldn't be able to read your moves, since there's no delay. In other words, that should've hit."

name: Yuki
message: "And yet, it didn't hit. Plus, you can't even dodge my attacks."

name: Tomosane
message: "Ow!"

name: Yuki
message: "Hehehe... Weird, huh? You can't hit me at all, and you can't defend yourself."
What's going on? She's not just reacting to my movements. It's like she's predicting them all beforehand."

name: Yuki
message: "All right. You'll have to remember it by the pain in your body. The real training starts now."

name: Tomosane
message: "Haaa... Haa..."

name: Yuki
message: "You're tired already? How can you get tired in a dream?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Shut up..."
Damn it... Yuki's right.
Why am I breathing hard? This is just a dream.

name: Yuki
message: "Come on, you can do better than that. I'm disappointed."
Now that I think of it...
Why is Yuki so strong?
She should be as strong as I am.
Maybe it's because this is a dream?
No, in that case...

name: Yuki
message: "What are you spacing out for? That's no good."

name: Yuki
message: "Now you're just getting sloppy. You're letting me hit you with both hands."

name: Tomosane
message: "Damn it!"
My attacks couldn't hit her. She avoided them all without difficulty.
Why?
Since this is a battle in a dream world, where our bodies don't really exist, there's no delay between our brain and our muscles.
Because we don't have physical bodies here.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
How can I feel pain in a dream?
I read in a book that you can hear, feel, taste, and smell in a dream.
But it's supposed to be impossible to feel pain in a dream.
So why am I feeling pain?
What is... pain?
I collapsed, falling to the ground.

name: Tomosane
message: "Haa, haa, haa..."
Even in the dream, it hurt to breathe. My entire body hurt.
Why?

name: Yuki
message: "I didn't think you were that dim, Tomosane."

name: Yuki
message: "At this rate, you're gonna run out of time."
Time...
I'm going to run out of time?
If I lose consciousness here, I might never wake up again.
If this lucid dream ends, there will be nothing left for me except the end.
I won't be able to protect Hasaki...

name: Tomosane
message: "Ugh... Aaaahh!"

name: Tomosane
message: "Agh!"

name: Yuki
message: "Being reckless won't help you now. If this was the real world, I could beat you just by breaking your body, right?"

name: Yuki
message: "But in a battle between minds, what good does that do?"

name: Tomosane
message: "A battle between minds..."
A battle happening between two minds.
That's right. It hurt so bad, but it wasn't the real world.
The world existed only in our minds.
The pain I was feeling was only created by my mind.
Only my mind.

name: Yuki
message: "Now that you've abused your body and gotten yourself all beaten up, do you understand? Or is this all going to end before you figure it out?"
Was there something I was supposed to understand from abusing my body?
No... The truth is, I wasn't abusing my body at all.
Then why did my body hurt so much?

name: Tomosane
message: "So much?"
It still hurt to breathe.
Why did it hurt?

name: Tomosane
message: "It hurts... to breathe?"
Mysteriously, Yuki smiled.
Why?
Was that the answer?
The pain of breathing... Is that the answer?

name: Tomosane
message: "The reason it hurts to breathe in my dream is because..."
Because in this state of half-wakening, the mind mistakes the sleeping body for a waking one.
In other words, it's the same as sleep paralysis.

name: Tomosane
message: "Sleep paralysis."

name: Yuki
message: "Only subjective time exists in a dream. If you believe that my attacks are unbelievably fast, then they will be."
I felt that Yuki's attacks were fast.
Not just fast... unavoidable.
Like my body was submerged in lead.

name: Tomosane
message: "It's like my body's made of lead."

name: Yuki
message: "This mental world only has subjective time. Think about what it means that we're in a lucid dream."
Yuki's attacks were terrifyingly fast.
They were ridiculously fast, but somehow, I had started to see them with my eyes.
But...
But I couldn't dodge it. Yuki's fist struck me in the chest.
Dull pain flowed through my breast.
The shock from the blow sent me sprawling backward several steps.

name: Tomosane
message: "Next!"
It was a straight punch. The hardest strike to dodge, because the distance is the shortest.
But this time I could follow its trajectory with my eyes.
Then I realized for the first time...
The sound of her fist cutting through air was stretched out, and everything I saw appeared to be in slow motion.
Yuki's attacks weren't fast. I was just very slow.
I took another punch, unable to dodge it.
Pain ran through my body.
But I noticed that the pain also seemed to spread more slowly.
Everything was slower.
That's right. Yuki wasn't particularly fast to begin with. What I hadn't realized before was how slow I was.

name: Tomosane
message: "Ah!"
After the attack, time sped up to normal speed again.
In the moment when Yuki attacked... no, when either of us attacked, time slowed down to a crawl, like we were underwater.
It was just like...

name: Tomosane
message: "A dream..."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. This is a dream, after all."
This is a dream?
I felt slow because it's a dream.
My opponent was moving at normal speed, but my own body would hardly move.
Something very common.
And I assumed the reverse of that common occurence.
I didn't think I was slow.
I thought Yuki was just very fast.
But that's not the truth.
This happens all the time in dreams.

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. It happens all the time in dreams. So what are you going to do about it?"
Yuki attacked again.
The sound of her attack was slowly transmitted to me as her fist moved forward.
Yuki wasn't fast. I was slow.
Even knowing that, there was nothing I could do to react.
I misunderstood the truth, but the result was the same either way.
Yuki's attacks hit, and mine missed.
No matter how hard I tried to push my body, it wouldn't move fast enough.
Quite the opposite. The more I thought about it, the slower my body got.
The next one struck me in the face.
Then a thought occurred to me.
Does getting punched really hurt?
I expected the dull pain to erupt in my cheek.
And when I thought that...
The pain stopped and disappeared.

name: Yuki
message: "You want to master the lucid dream, right?"
Master it?
I was trying to learn about lucid dreams from Yuki.
I didn't come here to learn how to fight.
My skills hadn't atrophied to the point where I needed lessons from Yuki.
And of course, my martial prowess couldn't be inferior to Mamiya Takuji's either.

name: Tomosane
message: "A lucid dream... I see. So that's what it is."
I found a simple answer.
The most natural answer.

name: Tomosane
message: "This isn't a lucid dream."

name: Tomosane
message: "This is just... a dream."

name: Tomosane
message: "No, since I'm partially awake, maybe it's cloer to sleep paralysis."

name: Tomosane
message: "Which means..."
Yuki moved to attack me again.
I didn't dodge the attack.
I didn't run.
I moved straight foward to meet her fist.
A lucid dream isn't just a dream that you recognize as a dream.
It's a dream that you recognize for what it is, so that you can control it.
Which I means I can alter the dream as I wish.
It's said that there was a tribe in southeast Asia that had trained themselves in the art of lucid dreaming since ancient times.
That technique involved recognizing a dream for what it was.
For instance, the tribe members would talk about dreams with each other when they were awake.
By talking about them, the dreams became encoded in language, assuming a form that could be more easily grasped and understood.
And then, there was one thing they had to do when they realized it was a dream.
That one thing was simply not running away.
Most lucid dreams are born of nightmares.
A nightmare happens when a person creates an embodiment of their anxiety in a dream.
And then they fear the nightmare.
No, in truth it is that embodiment of terror within the nightmare which they fear.
There's no need to fear something in a dream.
But no one is free from fear.
Because they can't recognize that the dream is just a dream.
Recognizing the dream for what it is.
That alone isn't enough to create a lucid dream.
A lucid dream is the inability to run from the embodiment of fear dwelling in the bottom of your heart.
The important part is to conquer that fear.
If you can beat back the fear...
If in your dreams you feel no fear...

name: Yuki
message: "Oh, shoot..."
Yuki's attack didn't even graze me, cutting through the empty air.
I moved to hit her while she was open.
I clenched my fist.
No hesitation.
"I might not hit."
"I might be powerless."
"I might not win."
Eliminate all doubt.
All I could think in that moment...

name: Tomosane
message: "My fist will find its mark."

name: Yuki
message: "Whoa!"
My fist slammed into Yuki's cheekbone.
There was no pain in my fist.
Yuki was blown away, just like that.

name: Tomosane
message: "Yuki!"

name: Yuki
message: "Oww! Hey now,
take it easy."

name: Tomosane
message: "S-Sorry."

name: Yuki
message: "Jeez."
Then she rubbed her cheek, and her split lip healed back to normal.

name: Yuki
message: "And that's that."

name: Tomosane
message: "I see. So I was trying to have a lucid dream until now."

name: Yuki
message: "That's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "Then... what about the dream up until now?"

name: Yuki
message: "It's your dream, of course. But it's my dream too."

name: Yuki
message: "We're just doing the same thing we did when we first met, only we're in the subconscious, in a dream, instead of fully conscious."

name: Tomosane
message: "Only in a dream?"

name: Yuki
message: "That's right. Whenever we meet in the real world, that's not actually the real world. It's the exact same as this world."

name: Yuki
message: "It's a world contained within our minds."

name: Yuki
message: "When our entire brain is working all at once like that, for some reason we can't actually tell that we're fighting someone in our head, not a real person."

name: Yuki
message: "But the truth is, it's the same thing as this."

name: Yuki
message: "In our world, the person who wants it more gets the initiative."

name: Yuki
message: "You seem to be under the impression that Mamiya Takuji is the game master of this world and the two of us are just pawns on the chessboard, but you're wrong."

name: Yuki
message: "The fact is, there is no single game master who controls this world."

name: Yuki
message: "Reality bends to serve the person who believes harder."

name: Yuki
message: "That's why you wanted it to be a lucid dream."

name: Yuki
message: "So that you could pull Mamiya Takuji off his throne as the game master."

name: Tomosane
message: "Wait... If you can control lucid dreams, then why can't you stop Mamiya Takuji yourself?"

name: Yuki
message: "You should've understood that from what just happened. A lucid dream is just believing in yourself and overcoming the fear within."

name: Yuki
message: "I can control dreams and subconscious worlds, but I can't control the real world."

name: Tomosane
message: "Is it possible to control the real world like that?"

name: Yuki
message: "Right now, Mamiya Takuji absolutely believes that he can change the world by his will. He thinks he's the avatar of God on Earth."

name: Tomosane
message: "The avatar of God?"

name: Yuki
message: "Yes. At some point he began to believe that he could control not only his own mind, but the entire world with his will."

name: Yuki
message: "There's no way my will could overcome someone like that, right?"

name: Tomosane
message: "Maybe, but..."

name: Yuki
message: "But what? If you think you can't beat him, you might as well give up now. Let me just say it now: if you're already hesitating, you won't win."

name: Tomosane
message: "Won't win..."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah..."

name: Tomosane
message: "I remember you said this."

name: Yuki
message: "What?"

name: Tomosane
message: "You said he was growing stronger, so this would be the end."

name: Yuki
message: "Yeah, that's right."

name: Tomosane
message: "That's not true."

name: Yuki
message: "Huh?"

name: Tomosane
message: "I'm going to go find Hasaki before my battle with Mamiya."

name: Yuki
message: "Wait, that's impossible. There's no time..."
I understood what Yuki was saying.
This lucid dream will disappear.
Yuki's lucid dream will end here.
As Yuki floated in unconsciousness, she must've even thought that she would never be able to rise to consciousness again.
That's why she said this would be the end.
I understand that.
I understand...

name: Tomosane
message: "...The time when you float to the surface."
I felt the presentiment.
No, I felt the certainty.
The future I believe in is undoubtedly the future that will come to pass.
If he's the son of God, sent to save the world...
If he truly is the savior...
Then I will destroy his claim to divinity.
I will become the hero.
